description_long: This sports car features an aggressive, angular body design with a low profile and wide stance, finished in a striking red and black color scheme. The exterior is dominated by sharp, geometric lines and aerodynamic elements, including a pronounced front splitter and rear diffuser. The wheels are large, with a futuristic, multi-spoke design and deep wheel wells, suggesting high-performance suspension. The cockpit is compact and streamlined, with a canopy-style roof and minimal overhangs, emphasizing speed and agility. Subtle blue accents and lighting details are visible along the sides and interior, adding a high-tech aesthetic. The rear of the car is equipped with a prominent spoiler and exposed mechanical components, reinforcing its racing pedigree.
description: A low, angular red and black sports car with futuristic multi-spoke wheels, blue accent lighting, and a prominent rear spoiler. Its aggressive design and aerodynamic features highlight its high-performance intent.
description_view_0: Side view showcasing the car's low profile, angular bodywork, and large, futuristic wheels.
description_view_1: Front view emphasizing the sharp nose, wide stance, and aggressive front splitter.
description_view_2: Opposite side view mirroring the angular design and wheel details, with visible cockpit contours.
description_view_3: Rear view highlighting the prominent spoiler, rear diffuser, and exposed mechanical elements.
attribute_wheel_design: multi-spoke, futuristic black rims with deep wheel wells
